purpose: Encode HACC and Quantum duties in a law-first, fact-linked form for motion mapping.

factual_anchors: Hillside Manor redevelopment / RAD / repositioning materials
deontic: O(HACC, provide displacement notice)
O(HACC, provide comparable housing or comparable replacement-housing path)
O(HACC, provide actual and reasonable relocation assistance)
O(HACC, provide counseling as part of relocation)
F(HACC, treat displacement as complete before actual relocation)
entries.issue_theory: HACC kept the household in an unresolved relocation process while pressing toward possession / default.
narrow_relief: interim relief preserving status quo
denial or abatement of possession as premature
written relocation status and completion steps

factual_anchors: Administrative Plan naming Hillside Manor and Quantum
Blossom page saying applications are processed through HACC's PBV waitlist
priority groups for Hillside relocation households
deontic: O(HACC, administer separate waiting-list / PBV structure for Hillside RAD project)
O(HACC, administer Hillside relocation households within the replacement-housing priority structure it adopted)
F(HACC, treat project-side replacement housing as wholly unstructured private discretion)
entries.issue_theory: HACC described the path as PBV-administered and priority-based, but the household was later treated as if it had no administrable track.
narrow_relief: written status of PBV / replacement-housing track
order preventing HACC from disclaiming responsibility for the track it adopted

factual_anchors: HACC told the household to choose Blossom or TPV
later HACC gave three written options and required move by April 30
deontic: O(HACC, administer the relocation options it directed the household to use)
F(HACC, convert its own unresolved option administration into household default)
P(household, pursue the HACC-directed relocation tracks while they remain active)
entries.issue_theory: HACC kept changing and extending structured options while later treating noncompletion as if it were solely tenant-caused.
narrow_relief: written status order
injunction against treating the unresolved track as abandonment
specific-performance style relief keyed to administration, not guaranteed outcome

deontic: O(HACC, provide lawful notice and hearing process for covered adverse actions)
F(HACC, rely on unexplained covered adverse actions without the required notice / review structure)
entries.issue_theory: HACC changed housing status and channels in ways that appear to have hearing and notice consequences.
narrow_relief: require HACC to identify hearing path
require status clarification before relying on the adverse action

deontic: O(HACC, maintain and use an emergency-transfer framework lawfully)
O(HACC, protect confidentiality in the transfer context)
F(HACC, disregard protection-order-linked safety context when administering access / transfer decisions)
entries.issue_theory: The transfer path was opened in principle but not coherently administered to completion.
narrow_relief: require lawful non-drift administration
require confidentiality and status clarity

factual_anchors: disability / live-in aide / service-animal / accessibility setting
deontic: O(HACC and Quantum, avoid discrimination in housing services and terms)
O(HACC and Quantum, provide reasonable accommodation where required)
F(HACC and Quantum, interfere with or retaliate against protected housing-rights activity)
entries.issue_theory: Application and relocation handling may have been burdened by discriminatory or interfering treatment.
narrow_relief: no-interference order
preserve and process accommodation and application paths
status-quo relief

factual_anchors: Hillside Manor leasing office intake path
Parkside Heights / Blossom / Hillside overlap theory
deontic: O(Quantum, if it received the relocation/application packet, preserve and properly route it)
F(Quantum, lose, block, or discriminatorily mishandle the intake path it controlled)
O(Quantum, if acting as project-side property manager in the PBV/RAD chain, administer intake consistently with that role)
entries.issue_theory: Quantum appears to have been inside the intake chain and the record supports a packet-routing failure.
narrow_relief: preserve documents
identify intake handling
process or reprocess application path nondiscriminatorily

legal_sources: HACC Administrative Plan informal hearing before eviction language
factual_anchors: Hillside Manor as a RAD/PBV project
deontic: O(project-side owner/manager, provide opportunity for informal hearing before eviction in the RAD/PBV setting)
entries.issue_theory: The project-side eviction path should not be treated as ordinary private-market eviction without the hearing structure HACC's own plan describes.
narrow_relief: insist on hearing-path identification
challenge possession proceeding as incomplete / premature in the project setting

factual_anchors: HAP / RAD HAP / management role referenced but not fully produced
deontic: P(packet, rely on statute, regulation, plan, and public materials now)
F(packet, overstate missing executed agreements as if already in evidence)
entries.issue_theory: HACC duties are already strongly grounded; Quantum's role is grounded more narrowly until executed contracts are produced.
narrow_relief: use law-first and plan-first theories now
reserve stronger contract-duty arguments for later production
